eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 06:58 AM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 07:13 AM MAY 18, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
WANTED FOR IMMINENT AND CREDIBLE THREAT TO KILL OR SERIOUSLY INJURE LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICER ON SUNDAY, 05/17/2026 AT 02:10 AM  AT CARUTHERSVILLE, MISSOURI

SUSPECT 1, ZACHARY RANCE WALKER IS A WHITE MALE, AGE 42, 5 FEET 9 INCHES TALL, 180 POUNDS, HAS PARTIALLY GRAY HAIR AND BLUE EYES. 
LAST SEEN WEARING A NAVY T-SHIRT WITH A GRAPHIC DESIGN, DARK COLORED SHORTS, AND BLACK LACE-UP BOOTS. 
SUSPECT IS COVERED IN TATTOOS AND HAS POSSIBLE GUNSHOT WOUNDS. 
KNOWN TO BE ARMED WITH A RIFLE AND HANDGUN.

WALKER FIRED SHOTS AT CARUTHERSVILLE POLICE OFFICERS DURING A TRAFFIC STOP THEN FLED THE SCENE. IT IS BELIEVED THAT HE WAS WOUNDED WHEN OFFICERS RETURNED FIRE. . 

IF LOCATED, CONTACT YOUR LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT OR CALL 9 1 1.
